title: Require Nx Project Quality Targets
forbids: an unclassified Nx project, an ambiguous project kind, a missing public check, a code project without typecheck, or any resolved lint owner other than habitat
why: Nx resolves package scripts, inferred targets, and project metadata into one project graph. This rule admits every non-root project through that graph and proves that inference cannot create a second lint owner.
remediate: Declare exactly one type:* tag and a public check target for every non-root project. Code projects also declare typecheck; content and fixture projects remain explicit exemptions. Remove every lint target except habitat:lint.
message: Nx projects must expose their kind and foundational quality targets through one resolved graph.
